name: oh-my-codex
description: Multi-agent orchestration layer for OpenAI Codex CLI

interface.shortDescription: Workflow layer and skill bundle for OpenAI Codex CLI.
interface.longDescription: Plugin = OMX skill/workflow discovery. Setup = runtime wiring; keep npm install plus omx setup for native agents, prompts, config, hooks, AGENTS.md, HUD, and runtime state.
